Off Calendar May-19-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Benjamin Elliot Kaplan, Esq., 415-447-8300, appearing for SFBA Investment, Plaintiff
Alex Berline, Esq., 415-777-3200, appearing for Jaydipsinh Devdhara,Defendant
Court reporter: Candace Yount. CSR #2737. T (415)994-5619.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) .

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENTS JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA AND VIKRAMSINH DEVDHARA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. The Court notes that Respondent only moves for summary judgment and not for summary adjudication. Moving party failed to shift its burden as to the fourth cause of action re: entitlement to a judgment as a matter of law on violation of confidentiality and lack of triable issues of fact. The Court further notes that the Notice of Motion, the Points and Authorities are internally inconsistent by apparently referencing the issue of additional attorneys' fees in the Notice of Motion only as a part of undefined "other relief," (see Reply) and by addressing the same issue as "first cause of action" in the Points and Authorities and Separate Statement (e.g. Separate Statement (2:3-5). Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
